description: Create a version update channel feature - a Telegram channel module where the bot posts version/update announcements automatically. Includes a new bot/version_channel.py module with functions to announce new versions, changelog entries, and system status updates to a configured channel.
steps: Add VERSION_CHANNEL_ID setting to core/config.py Settings class (optional int field, default None) - this is the Telegram channel ID where version updates are posted

Create bot/version_channel.py with a VersionChannel class that has: (a) post_version_update(version, changelog) method - posts a formatted update announcement to the channel, (b) post_system_status(status_data) method - posts system health/status update, (c) post_changelog_entry(entry) method - posts a single changelog item
Add a /version bot command in bot/handler.py that shows current version and last update info
Add a startup version announcement in main.py that calls VersionChannel.post_version_update() on boot to announce the system is running with current version
Add a CHANGELOG.md file at anti_stalker_pro/CHANGELOG.md with version 2.0.0 entry documenting the version channel feature and all bug fixes
Add tests in tests/test_version_channel.py that verify the VersionChannel class methods format messages correctly and handle missing channel ID gracefully
Run all tests to confirm: python -m pytest tests/ -v
acceptance_criteria: core/config.py has version_channel_id (Optional[int], default None) and app_version (str, default '2.0.0') fields
bot/version_channel.py exists with VersionChannel class containing post_version_update, post_system_status, and post_changelog_entry methods
bot/handler.py has /version command registered and implemented
main.py sends startup version announcement via VersionChannel
CHANGELOG.md exists with meaningful version history
All tests pass: python -m pytest tests/ -v
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -c "from bot.version_channel import VersionChannel; print('VersionChannel imported OK')"

cd /projects/sandbox/Export-bot/anti_stalker_pro && python -c "from core.config import Settings; s = Settings; fields = s.model_fields; assert 'version_channel_id' in fields; assert 'app_version' in fields; print('Config fields OK')"
